series_metadata.series_description: Initiative and referendum petitions related to the Ohio Attorney General's Office (OAG) responsibilities set forth in ORC 3519.01. Records include, but are not limited to, petitions submitted by petitioners, forms issued by OAG to the County Board of Elections (BOE) to report the number of valid signatures and the County BOE responses thereto, rejection notification correspondence, legal memos and research, recommendations to Attorney General, and correspondence related to the petition.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from certification, rejection, or withdrawal. Official certification letter retained under 86-OAG-58 schedule. Have reviewed by State Archives before destroying petition materials. ; Paper: certification, rejection, or withdrawal. Official certification letter retained under 86-OAG-58 schedule. Have reviewed by State Archives before destroying petition materials
